title: Lavauxia graminifolia
taxonomy: Lavauxia graminifolia is a species of liverwort in the family Lophoziaceae. It is a non-vascular plant that belongs to the division Marchantiophyta. Lavauxia graminifolia is typically found in tropical and subtropical regions, often growing on rocks and tree trunks. This species is known for its small, leaf-like structure and its ability to thrive in moist environments. Classification of Lavauxia graminifolia is further detailed at the genus and species levels within the kingdom Plantae.
